lanes.platform_contract_role: NDR visibility and cross-source corroboration boundary contract only.
lanes.supported_claim: HO-NDR-001 validation contracts enforce sanitized visibility and cross-source corroboration shape without packet, route, signal, runtime, or public proof claims.
lanes.next_gate: Runtime capture, evidence-link review, proof update, and public-safe review require separate approval.

lanes.platform_contract_role: Pipeline route integrity and field-preservation contract only.
lanes.supported_claim: HO-PIPE-001 validation contracts enforce source-controlled route-integrity shape and required field preservation without traffic delivery, route proof, signal, runtime, or public proof claims.
lanes.next_gate: Proof index, runtime route, signal correlation, and public-safe wording require separate approval.

claim_boundary: Telemetry coverage contract validation is platform contract truth only. It does not prove runtime-active status, signal-observed status, live Splunk, Cribl-routed proof, Wazuh-routed proof, Security Onion observed proof, production-ready status, public-safe runtime status, autonomous SOC behavior, AI-approved status, or analyst-approved status.
next_gate: Human review, proof repository follow-up, workflow follow-up, runtime approval, evidence-link review, and public-safe review remain separate scopes.
